### 📝 Request Type
- [ ] Technical SOP (e.g., Boiler, HVAC, Lubrication)
- [ ] Commercial/Tender Guidance (BOM/BOQ, Clauses)
- [ ] Career Mentorship (Fatehpur-to-Gulf Roadmap)
- [ ] Other Engineering Challenge

### 🔍 Description of the Requirement
*Please describe the specific system, machine, or challenge you need help with.*

### 🎯 Desired Outcome
*What is the goal? (e.g., "I need a checklist for a JCI Audit" or "I need to size a filtration system for a cement plant")*

### 🌍 Impact
*Is this for a professional project or for student learning?*

---
**Note:** By submitting this, you are contributing to the open-source knowledge hub of the **M.M.F. Trust**. I will review and upload the solution to the **Vault** for everyone to benefit.
